evidence: The official Family Resource Center page and same-domain providers.csv preserve reviewed storefront rows for only 34 of Florida’s 67 counties. The live first-party MyACCESS Community Partner Search at https://myaccess.myflfamilies.com/Public/CPCPS is a JavaScript shell, appconfig.js exposes officeMapping=/dataexchangeproxy, and a bounded plain GET to https://myaccess.myflfamilies.com/dataexchangeproxy returns the same shell instead of county results. The remaining 33 counties therefore require browser-assisted or documented API-contract extraction from the official first-party lane.
